options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies ILM cell name that will be validated

options.name: -ref_tag
options.description: Specifies reference tag name of the reference ILM model

options.name: -slack_threshold
options.description: Specified the slack threshold for reporting number mismatched slacks over threshold

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies type for model checking. It can be ilm, pnr, or flexilm
